mapper.select:
SELECT i.material_id, i.material_name, i.spec_model, i.current_qty, i.unit, i.ref_price, (i.current_qty * i.ref_price) as total_value, i.last_inbound_date, i.last_outbound_date FROM inventory i
AND (i.material_name LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') OR i.material_id LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY i.material_id
